channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. NASA Plans to Test Fire on The Moon Ahead of Future Missions  ScienceAlert
  2. NASA Plans to Start a Fire on the Moon in First-of-Its-Kind Experiment  Gizmodo
  3. NASA Wants to See What Happens When You Start a Fire On the Moon  VICE
  4. Gravity’s blind spot: Inside the ‘hidden’ fires tests protecting the Artemis missions  The News International
  5. NASA plans moon fire experiment to boost Artemis mission safety  The Nation (Pakistan )
